{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032400505809958D959FC4CBE27F05"}"},"total":1096},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7608636125999727384","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔不错，看起来很过瘾，不过比较适合没有看过电视剧的人，因为看过剧的人都很容易代入进去原剧里的爱恨情仇和爱好偏向什么的，这本文里的女主从一开始的目的就很明确-母仪天下，不是为了逆袭也不是为了复仇，哪怕有这行为也只是顺带，主要是为了获得皇帝真心，女主心智也很坚定，再多的爱也打动不了她想要长生的心，个人是蛮喜欢这样有脑子目标明确的女主的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771533658,"group_id":"7338563056097561662","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2xtqfbBp9t/9zsynlpbWVg=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"103114535239","user_name":"珈蓝之南"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"103114535239","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7338563056097561662","book_info":{"abstract":"本书又名—帝王攻略笔记
女主令仪，时空穿梭局许愿部新人。
人设：为达目的不择手段，不是啥好人。
剧情重在攻心，跟女人斗永无止境，跟男人斗一劳永逸。
甄嬛传—安陵容（完结）
如懿传—索绰伦阿箬（完结）
延禧攻略—喜塔腊尔晴（完结）
休假世界—静女其姝（完结）
佛前莲花—清扬婉兮（完结）
知否知否—盛墨兰（完结）
步步惊心—郭络罗明玉（完结）
还珠格格—陈知画（完结）
如懿传—富察琅嬅（完结）
美人心计—栗妙人（完结）
大明风华—胡善祥（完结）
新还珠—胡若兰（完结）

on":164882,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":261848,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1864},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7407718861122241304","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"从一开始和其他女频综影视的类型差不多，到中期出现了不同，增加了反转，将此文与其他分开，到最后内容风格的提升，改变，让此文与其他的分辨开来，    [思考]。总之作者写的很好，女主并不是完美型人格，并不是所有人都十全十美，           ；作者从顺势而写到有自己的风格，可以看出作者的文笔在不断进步。[思考][思考][思考]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724747956,"group_id":"7338563056097561662","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"休恋逝水 0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18075,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4783},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7514234601144517438","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"大部分世界都很喜欢，偶尔也会有些小瑕疵，瑕不掩瑜，墨兰世界，知画世界最喜欢琼瑶味儿太正了，女主能演会装，还能保持本心[飞吻]就是结局很突然，番外也戛然而止。第一个世界，雍正最后给女主最后留了三条路真的很催泪，但他们重逢的那个世界，只因期望太高，所以会有些失望，远比不上宋君尧与女主知否世界的相遇[重拳出击]","text_exts":[{"e":152,"s":148,"text":"重拳出击","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%87%8D%E6%8B%B3%E5%87%BA%E5%87%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774284658CBE27F05%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227514234601144517438%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227338563056097561662%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%87%8D%E6%8B%B3%E5%87%BA%E5%87%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749551604,"group_id":"7338563056097561662","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"各类酸甜爽文，愿文如其名，不负读者「柠檬如翡翠，绿影润清空」","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+OKxnUqMTl+mH0hvbEOLSA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/72defb8c19734fd498ae67d5f12f3c5a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776881453&x-signature=I69UbOLtT9r4rianoJFpMAVqJJ0%3D","user_id":"96634396080","user_name":"嫩柠檬"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"96634396080","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}
